$schema: Utopia Suite typography — source of truth at ~/.claude/rules/utopia-brand-system.md

wordmark.reference: Travis Scott UTOPIA album aesthetic — thin sharpie strokes, imperfect lowercase, artist signature
wordmark.source: AI-generated via Recraft V4 through fal.ai, refined in Illustrator/Figma
wordmark.usage: brand name only — do NOT use this font for body copy, product names, or anything else

display.usage: section headings, product names on site, pull quotes

body.source: Google Fonts, SIL Open Font License
body.usage: all body copy, navigation, form inputs, email templates, ingredient lists

rules: Three fonts only. The hand-drawn wordmark is brand-name-exclusive. Georgia is for display. Inter is for everything else.
NO italic Georgia except for the tagline 'Find Your Utopia.' — italic is a tagline signal.
NO font weights above 600 anywhere. Utopia Raw is quiet, not loud.
Ingredient lists on labels: Inter 6pt, tracked loose for small-size legibility.
